name: KRAKacquisition Corp
business: KRAKacquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on July 28, 2025, formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar Business Combination with one or more businesses. The Company is not limited to a particular industry or geographic region for purposes of consummating a Business Combination.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: The Company will have until January 29, 2028, 24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering to complete a Business Combination.
